question: ¿Serán las cinco mayores empresas del mundo del sector tecnológico a finales de 2025?
resolution_criteria: The question will be answered as **Yes** if, as of December 31, 2025, the five largest global companies by market capitalization are in the technology sector, according to [ <u>CompaniesMarketCap</u> ](https://companiesmarketcap.com/). It will be answered as **No** if any of the top five are not considered technology companies.
background: The major tech companies, often referred to as FAANG (Facebook, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, and Google), have dominated global market capitalization in recent years. As of February 2025, Apple leads with a market cap of $3.657 trillion, followed by Nvidia ($3.435 trillion) and Microsoft ($3.039 trillion). Amazon and Alphabet round out the top five. Notably, Saudi Aramco, a non-tech company, is ranked sixth, while Meta Platforms is ranked seventh.
